# UC-22.57.12 · SG Cyber Act CII Threat-Sharing Programme (CTSP) + AISP integration health

> **Criticality:** Medium &middot; **Difficulty:** Advanced &middot; **Pillar:** Security &middot; **Type:** Compliance, Security &middot; **Wave:** Walk &middot; **Status:** Verified

*Singapore's cyber agency shares warnings with us about new attacks, and we share back. We make sure those warning channels are always working.*

---

## Description

Surveys CSA CTSP / AISP feed freshness.

## Value

Active CTSP/AISP participation demonstrates CCoP cooperation and feeds the SOC.

## Implementation

(1) Subscribe to CSA AISP + CTSP. (2) Wire into `threat_intel`. (3) Schedule UC-22.57.12 hourly. (4) Build dashboard.

## Evidence

Saved search `UC-22.57.12` archived hourly to `audit_evidence` with `csa_clause="CSA-CTSP-AISP"`.

## Control test

### Positive scenario

Pause AISP feed. UC-22.57.12 MUST flag within 1h.

### Negative scenario

Resume feed. UC-22.57.12 MUST NOT escalate.

## Detailed Implementation

## Prerequisites

Same as UC-22.56.23.

## Step 1 — Wire feeds

Configure TAXII client to subscribe to CSA AISP + CTSP; tag source as `CSA_AISP` / `CSA_CTSP`.

## Step 2 — Schedule

```ini
[UC-22.57.12: CSA CTSP/AISP Health]
cron_schedule = */60 * * * *
actions = summary_index, notable
action.summary_index._name = audit_evidence
action.summary_index.marker = uc=22.57.12,reg=SG-Cyber-Act,clause=CSA-CTSP-AISP
alert.severity = 3
```

## Step 3 — Runbook

**`feed_status=stale`**: re-establish; investigate gap window.

**SG-specific failure modes**:
- **TLP:RED**: classified indicators may go through separate channel; coordinate with CC.
- **Cross-sector indicator dissemination**: CSA may route sector-specific indicators; ensure correct CSC subscription.

## SPL

```spl
| metadata type=sources index=threat_intel
| eval source_normalized = case(
    match(source, "(?i)csa.+aisp"), "CSA_AISP",
    match(source, "(?i)csa.+ctsp"), "CSA_CTSP",
    1=1, "other")
| where source_normalized!="other"
| eval hours_since_event = round((now() - lastTime)/3600, 1)
| eval feed_status = case(
    isnull(lastTime), "never_seen",
    hours_since_event > 4, "stale",
    1=1, "healthy")
| where feed_status IN ("never_seen","stale")
| table source_normalized hours_since_event feed_status
```

## Visualization

(Panel 1) Per-feed freshness. (Panel 2) Indicator-volume trend. (Panel 3) Operationalised vs raw. (Panel 4) CTSP-engagement log.

## Known False Positives

1. **Burst-cadence**: CSA feeds may burst; tune.

**Suppression mechanism**: KV Store `csa_22_57_12_exceptions`.

## References

- [CSA CTSP](https://www.csa.gov.sg/our-programmes/csa-collaboration-and-sharing)
